title: Firework Aviators
description: Boost yourself with the rockets without the Elytras, or at least you will try...
body:
Description

 

Did you always want to fly before you got the Elytras? No? Well here I present a super-mega-safe way to fly semi-uncontrollably through your world!

Now when you use a firework rocket you will be propelled by it in the direction you are facing. This will allow you to go up and down quite quickly, albeit quite erratically, so be careful! A higher level firework rocket will be more powerful!

 

You can modify in the configuration file various aspects of the mod. ^^

 

Support

Suggestion and Support here! >Here!

Issue Tracker here!
